The [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] known as '''Kler'terrians''' were native to the [[Kler'terria system/Legends|Kler'terria system]], a [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] [[Star system/Legends|star system]]. The Kler'terrians had four [[Limb/Legends|arms]], which they could move independently of each other. On the top of their heads, they had three [[Ommatophora|eyestalks]], arranged equidistant from each other. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the Kler'terrian [[Gor'telp]] worked as a [[Bartender/Legends|bartender]] at [[Shilley's]], an [[Cantina/Legends|establishment]] on the planet [[Questal/Legends|Questal]].

==Biology and appearance==
The Kler'terrians were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] with three flexible [[Ommatophora|eyestalks]] evenly spaced on the crown of their heads. These eyestalks could operate independently, allowing members of the species 360-degree vision. The Kler'terrians had large [[Mouth/Legends|mouths]], with two [[Tooth/Legends|canines]] protruding from the lower jaw. The species had four [[Limb/Legends|arms]]; their second set of shoulders was located directly under the first. Those arms ended in hands with three fingers and an opposable thumb, and the Kler'terrians could quite comfortably manage four independent tasks with their arms. The Kler'terrian [[Gor'telp]] had a paunch.<ref name="CC5" />

==History==
The Kler'terrians were native to [[Kler'terria system/Legends|Kler'terria system]], a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located in the south-western portion of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="TEAOC" /> During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the Kler'terrian Gor'telp worked as a [[Bartender/Legends|bartender]] at [[Shilley's]], a seamy [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] on the planet [[Questal/Legends|Questal]]. In addition to serving [[Alcohol/Legends|alcohol]], Gor'telp kept a close eye on events in the cantina. Although his first choice when anticipating trouble from one of the patrons was to call in the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Bouncer (occupation)/Legends|bouncer]] [[Snufftalon]], Gor'telp also kept three [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]]—set to [[Stun/Legends|stun]]—hidden along the bar. Gor'telp was working when agents of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] visisted the establishment on Questal to track down missing Rebel operative [[Tay Vanis]].<ref name="CC5" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Kler'terrians were created by [[Robert Kern]] for the [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] adventure ''[[The Game Chambers of Questal]]'', published by [[West End Games]] as a standalone paperback in [[1990]],<ref name="Game Chambers">''[[The Game Chambers of Questal]]''</ref> and as part of the collection ''[[Classic Adventures: Volume Five]]'' in [[1995]]. The Kler'terrian Gor'telp was illustrated by [[Andrew Bates]] and [[Ramón Pérez]].<ref name="CC5" />
